label: Job giver seek safe temperature
description: Directs the pawn to move to a region within its comfortable temperature range.

maxRadius.label: Max radius
maxRadius.description: Maximum distance in cells the pawn will travel to find a safe temperature zone. -1 means unlimited.

requiresInjury.label: Requires injury
requiresInjury.description: If true, the pawn only seeks safe temperature when it has a serious temperature injury.

waitInSafeTemp.label: Wait in safe temp
waitInSafeTemp.description: If true, the pawn issues a short wait job when already in a safe temperature region.
